section: ## 8 · LLM-as-judge & verifiers (alignment, biases, verifiable vs judgeable)
title: BabelJudge: Measuring LLM-as-a-Judge Reliability Across Languages and Agent Trajectories

worker.candidate_reason: It contributes an open reliability audit framework and agent-trajectory perturbation tests rather than another generic judge prompt; useful for calibrating LLM-as-judge claims.
